name: Mudman Public Company Limited
summary: Mudman Public Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the retail of food and beverages in Thailand and internationally. It operates in two segments, Food and Beverage, and Garment. The Food and Beverage segment produces and distributes snacks, drinks, and ice cream, as well as operates restaurants. The Garment segment manufactures and distributes ready-made clothing and leather goods. The company operates as an authorized franchisee for Au Bon Pain bakery caf√É¬©, Baskin Robbins, and Dunkin' Donuts; and owns brands, such as Greyhound Original, Greyhound Caf√É¬©, Another Hound Caf√É¬©, Le Grand V√É¬©four, and M Kitchen. It has approximately 430 stores of quick services restaurants. The company is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Mudman Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Sub Sri Thai Public Company Limited.
